meta.title: Run it in the factory: DDx executes a HELIX-planned bead

narration: Plan is approved. The runtime takes over. HELIX stays offstage — its job was the artifacts.

output:
Selected: bead-001 (CSV header sniffer)
Acceptance: schema-mapping.yaml exists
Evidence: tests/header_sniffer_test.go (3 fixtures)

assistant: FZO routes by preset + harness. Build presets prefer fast, cheap models.

output:
[fzo] preset: fast → claude-sonnet-4-6 (harness: claude)
[fzo] git worktree: .ddx/worktrees/bead-001
[fzo] cost cap: $0.50

narration: Isolation: throwaway worktree, no pollution of main.

output:
[claude] reading bead acceptance contract
[claude] reading docs/helix/01-frame/features/FEAT-001-csv-ingest.md
[claude] writing tests/header_sniffer_test.go (3 table-driven cases)
[claude] writing internal/ingest/header_sniffer.go (84 lines)
[claude] go test ./internal/ingest — PASS (3/3 in 0.04s)
[claude] writing schema-mapping.yaml (4 column mappings)
[claude] go test ./... — PASS (3/3)

assistant: Implementation done. Now the deterministic acceptance gate fires.

output:
[ddx] acceptance gate:
  · schema-mapping.yaml exists ............................. ✓
  · tests/header_sniffer_test.go has ≥3 fixtures ........... ✓ (3 found)
  · go test ./... ......................................... ✓
  · OWASP A03 injection scan (semgrep) .................... ✓ (0 sinks)

assistant: Cross-model adversarial review: a different model audits the work against the same artifacts.

output:
[ddx] review harness: gpt-5.4-mini
[ddx] reviewing against FEAT-001 + acceptance contract
  · spec compliance ........................................ ✓
  · duplication check ...................................... ✓
  · code quality (govet, staticcheck) ...................... ✓
  · no hardcoded secrets, no broad excepts ................. ✓

[ddx] merging .ddx/worktrees/bead-001 → main
[ddx] commit: feat(ingest): header sniffer (closes bead-001)
[ddx] evidence appended: .ddx/evidence/bead-001/
  · session.jsonl  (37 events)
  · acceptance.log
  · review.json
  · diff.patch

[ddx] bead-001 closed · wall 4m22s · spent $0.18 / $0.50 cap
[ddx] next ready bead: bead-002 (row-level validator) — run with `ddx bead next --execute`

narration: One bead, end-to-end. Tests, acceptance, cross-model review, evidence — all locked in and trace back to the artifacts that authorized the work.
